question: What text is visible on the white cardboard box label in the majority of the video chunks? A. SPOON/DISHER B. SCOOP/DISHER C. COOP/DISHER D. GROW/DISHER

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A white cardboard box filled with loose red strawberries sits on the left side of a dark brown wooden table. Multiple clear plastic clamshell containers filled with strawberries are stacked and arranged in rows next to the box. Green leafy strawberry tops are scattered on the surface in the bottom right corner. The side of the white box displays blue text reading "SCOOP/DISHER".
